name: sdd-bootstrap
description: Create implementation-ready SDD specifications and approved task contracts from GitHub/GitLab issues or supplied requirements. Supports project, feature, bugfix, and refactor modes with read-only codebase investigation.

interface.longDescription: Interview-driven project, feature, and bugfix specification for the first stage of the three-stage SDD workflow.
capabilities: Project, feature, bugfix, and refactor modes
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the sdd-bootstrap-interviewer skill to prepare approved implementation tasks.
